lessons.title: Equality Before the Law — Article 40.1
lessons.description: Let us start with the text itself, because the wording of this provision is crucial to understanding its scope — and its limits.

lessons.title: Unenumerated Personal Rights — Article 40.3
lessons.description: Let us begin with the text. Article 40.3.1° provides: "The State guarantees in its laws to respect, and, as far as practicable, to defend and vindicate the personal rights of the citizen."

lessons.title: Liberty of the Person — Article 40.4
lessons.description: Let us begin with the text. Article 40.4.1° provides: "No citizen shall be deprived of his personal liberty save in accordance with law."

lessons.title: Inviolability of the Dwelling — Article 40.5
lessons.description: The text is concise: "The dwelling of every citizen is inviolable and shall not be forcibly entered save in accordance with law."

lessons.title: Freedom of Expression — Article 40.6
lessons.description: Let us begin with the constitutional text. Article 40.6.1°(i) provides: "The right of the citizens to express freely their convictions and opinions." The subclause then immediately qualifies this: the education of public opinion i...

lessons.title: Freedom of Assembly and Association — Article 40.6
lessons.description: The constitutional text. Article 40.6.1°(ii) guarantees: "The right of the citizens to assemble peaceably and without arms." Article 40.6.1°(iii) guarantees: "The right of the citizens to form associations and unions." Both provis...
